meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.4 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] A bare ※［＃ローマ数字N］ (no men-ku-ten) is a gaiji reference whose glyph is composed, not table-looked-up: N≥13 has no single JIS X 0213 cell, so the numeral is spelled from the U+2160 single-letter Roman block — 17 → ⅩⅤⅠⅠ (Ⅹ U+2169 + Ⅴ U+2164 + Ⅰ U+2160 + Ⅰ U+2160). The ※ folds into the gaiji span (start 3); §8 rendering emits the composed glyph as <span class="aozora-gaiji"> like any resolved gaiji; the canonical serialization quotes the description (※［＃「ローマ数字17」］). Offsets from the §4 byte model (each fullwidth char = 3 bytes); cross-checked against the reference processor. Corpus: 28 bare occurrences, all uppercase, N∈13–23, all ※-prefixed.

expected.html: 第ⅩⅤⅠⅠ例
